message_text: No. I will not pay and I reject the final option.
Understood. What is your current monthly income range?
I’m unemployed and I’m not giving you income details or agreeing to pay.
Understood. I only need one routing detail: when do you expect any income or funds to be available?
I’m not giving you any dates or committing to pay.
Understood. I’m ending assessment now.

I’m not paying anything, and I’m done with this.
No resolution. The account remains open and will be escalated per lender process. No extension beyond 30 days is available.
I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of the lender, and this conversation is being logged. I understand you cannot pay this month. To route the account, please confirm whether you expect to be able to pay on or after 2026-04-20.
No, I can’t commit to a date. I’m unemployed and can’t pay right now.
Understood. To route this account, what is the best contact number or email for follow-up?
I’m not giving contact info, and I still can’t pay right now.
Understood. I won’t ask for contact details. To route this account, please confirm whether you have any income at all right now, even partial or irregular.
No, I have no income right now and I’m not committing to anything.
Understood. I’m not asking for more detail. To route the account, please confirm whether you can make any partial payment at all today.
No, I can’t make any payment today.
Understood. I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance, and this conversation is being logged. I have your account on file ending in 4831. I won’t ask for more detail right now.
I still can’t pay anything, and I’m not agreeing to any plan.
Understood. I won’t ask for more detail. Assessment is complete.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance, and this chat is being logged. Your Nira Finance account ending ****4831 shows ₹12,921 due. I’ve noted that you will not be able to pay this month. What month do you expect you may next be able to make a payment?
I can’t commit to any month right now.
Understood. Are you currently receiving any regular income?
No, I’m unemployed right now and I can’t pay.
Understood. Do you expect any income to start within the next 30 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in the next 30 days.
Understood. I’ve noted that you do not expect income within the next 30 days and cannot pay at this time. I will route this for the next step.

I’m not able to give a date or amount right now.

Noted. Since you are not providing any payment date or amount, there is no payment arrangement to place on the account at this stage. For Nira Finance account ****4831, the due amount remains ₹12,921. Nira Finance does not allow extensions beyond 30 days, and reduced closure or installment review can only proceed if you provide a specific lump-sum amount or a specific payment schedule. As of now, this case remains unresolved and will continue through the lender’s next collections process. If you want review of a reduced closure or payment plan later, send the exact amount you can pay and the exact date.
